title: BEM-923 curator response
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_RESPONSE.md with content # BEM-923 SYSTEM PROTOCOL V3 PROVIDER MODEL RESPONSE
Status: APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Findings:
- Worker approves the provider-model protocol update with requirements.
- The protocol must remain full-system, not Telegram-only.
- BEM-921 logical contour model is kept but must be expanded with provider execution layer.
- Primary internal contour: GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor.
- Reserve contour: GPT-Codex/Codex replaces Claude Auditor and Claude Executor when Claude limits or availability block execution.
- Prompt describes logical role; provider policy selects runtime provider.
- GitHub Actions, codex-runner, webhook and dispatch consumer are activation/proof mechanisms, not roles.
- Exchange files and event logs must carry logical_role, provider_id, provider_mode, fallback_used, fallback_reason, runner_ref and proof_ref.
Evidence:
- governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN_READY.md
- governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_REQUEST.md
- governance/audit/internal/results/BEM923_WORKER_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_REVIEW.md
Required registries:
- governance/state/providers_registry.json
- governance/state/contour_provider_policy.json
- governance/state/provider_failover_policy.json
- governance/state/elements_registry.json
- governance/state/contours_registry.json
Roadmap requirements:
- Provider registry and provider policy must be first-class implementation outputs.
- Provider-aware lifecycle must be included in dispatch, object/contour runner, managed channel, event log, proof and E2E tests.
- Claude re-audit package must include evidence for both primary and reserve provider scenarios.
Recommendation:
- Submit BEM-923 protocol v3 to operator for review.
No issue comments.
